title: Redesign User Profile Page
description: The current user profile page has poor information hierarchy and looks dated. Redesign it with a clean layout, proper spacing, and intuitive edit flows. Consider mobile responsiveness and accessibility.
requirements: Audit current profile page UX issues with screenshots
Create user flow diagram for profile viewing and editing
Design low-fidelity wireframes for 3 layout options
Design high-fidelity mockup in Figma with auto-layout
Include responsive states: mobile, tablet, desktop
Use design system components and tokens
client_context:
Subject: Profile Page Redesign

Our user profile page hasn't been updated in 2 years. Users find it hard to edit their information and the layout feels cluttered. Let's redesign it with a modern, clean look.

- Sarah (Product Manager)
expected_deliverable: Figma file with wireframes, high-fidelity mockups, and responsive variants

title: Create Onboarding Flow for New Users
description: Design a 3-step onboarding flow for new users. The flow should introduce key features, collect user preferences, and guide them to their first action. Keep it engaging but not overwhelming.
requirements: User research: identify what new users need to know most
Create user journey map for the onboarding experience
Design interactive prototype in Figma with transitions
State management: skipped, completed, in-progress, error
Progress indicator showing step position
A/B test two different onboarding approaches
client_context:
Subject: User Onboarding Flow

New user activation rate is only 40%. Users sign up but don't complete their first action. We need an engaging onboarding flow that helps users get started quickly.

- Rohan (Client)
expected_deliverable: Figma prototype with onboarding flow + user journey map + research findings

title: Design Component Library: Button System
description: Design a comprehensive button component system with all variants — primary, secondary, outline, ghost, danger, icon-only. Include all states: default, hover, active, disabled, loading, focused.
requirements: All button variants with consistent spacing and sizing
All interactive states: default, hover, active, disabled, focused, loading
Icon + text and icon-only variants
Sizes: small, medium, large with proportional padding
Design tokens for colors, spacing, typography, border-radius
Usage guidelines documentation
client_context:
Subject: Design System — Button Component

We need a consistent button system across all products. Currently every page has different button styles. Follow the atomic design methodology.

- Priya (Team Lead)
expected_deliverable: Figma component set with all button variants + usage documentation

title: Conduct Usability Test on Checkout Flow
description: Plan and conduct usability testing on the current checkout flow with 5 users. Identify pain points, measure task completion time, and provide actionable recommendations.
requirements: Define test objectives and create test script with 5-7 tasks
Recruit 5 participants matching target user profile
Conduct moderated usability testing sessions (recorded)
Document findings with severity ratings
Create priority matrix of issues found
Provide redesign recommendations with mockups
client_context:
Subject: Checkout Flow Usability Test

Cart abandonment rate is 70%. We suspect the checkout flow has usability issues. Let's test with real users and identify problems.

- Sarah (Product Manager)
expected_deliverable: Usability test report with findings, severity matrix, and redesign recommendations

title: Design Mobile App Dashboard
description: Design a mobile-first dashboard for the analytics app. The dashboard should display key metrics, charts, and recent activity in a layout optimized for mobile screens (375px width).
requirements: Mobile-first design starting at 375px width
Dashboard with 4-6 key metric cards in 2-column grid
At least one interactive chart (line or bar) optimized for touch
Recent activity list with infinite scroll
Bottom navigation bar with 5 tabs
Figma prototype with interactive transitions
client_context:
Subject: Mobile Dashboard Design

60% of our users access the platform from mobile. The current desktop dashboard doesn't work well on phones. We need a dedicated mobile dashboard experience.

- Rohan (Client)
expected_deliverable: Figma mobile-first dashboard design with interactive prototype

title: Create Accessibility Audit Report
description: Conduct an accessibility audit of the current web application against WCAG 2.1 AA standards. Identify violations, document them with severity, and provide fix recommendations.
requirements: Run automated accessibility scan using axe DevTools or WAVE
Manual keyboard navigation test for all interactive elements
Color contrast check for all text and background combinations
Screen reader test with NVDA or VoiceOver
Document findings with severity, location, and fix recommendations
Create accessible component checklist for future development
client_context:
Subject: Accessibility Compliance

We need WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for an enterprise client deal. Please audit the current application and create a fix plan.

- Security Team
expected_deliverable: Accessibility audit report with severity ratings + fix recommendations + checklist
